options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: <fileName>
options.description: Save restore script to this file. <filename>.dat will be the saved directory

options.name: -addTiming
options.description: Copy the old timing data when loaded in physical-only mode

options.name: -cellview
options.description: Save to this OA cellview {<libname> <cellname> <viewname>}

options.name: -current_top_cell_only
options.description: Only write current design module and its submodules in the netlist. By default, all the modules from the input netlist will be saved even if they don't belong to current design.

options.name: -def
options.description: Save a DEF file also

options.name: -keep_input_path
options.description: Save the path same as the path in the input file.

options.name: -lib2ldb
options.description: Convert .lib to .ldb for better restore performance

options.name: -libs
options.description: Resolve symlinks of timing lib files and side files

options.name: -mmmc2
options.description: Saves the complete design database in MMMC2 format

options.name: -noConstraint
options.description: Save the timing graph data doesn't have sdc constraints data

options.name: -noFill
options.description: Do not save any fill shapes

options.name: -no_pvs_fill
options.description: Tool not to save pvs fill data file

options.name: -no_wait
options.description: Saves the design in a separate process according setMultiCpuUsage setting, so users can continue executing new commands simultaneously while the design is being saved.

options.name: -oaLibs
options.description: Saves all OA libraries specified in cds.lib under directory libname/cellname/viewname/libs/oa/.

options.name: -oaUsedLibsOnly
options.description: Saves only the libraries listed in the init_oa_tech_lib, init_oa_ref_lib, and init_oa_search_lib, which are referenced through the on-demand processing. On specifying this parameter, a new cds.lib file is created with only the specified libraries. The libraries are saved under directory libname/cellname/viewname/libs/oa/.

options.name: -rc
options.description: Save the RC parasitic data

options.name: -saveRestoreFile
options.description: Specifies the file name that can be sourced to read back the OpenAccess Design

options.name: -skip_file
options.description: Remove db files have user information

options.name: -tcon
options.description: Save the timing constraint file even if not changed

options.name: -tgz
options.description: Make design data a tar ball

options.name: -timingGraph
options.description: Save the timing graph data

options.name: -user_path
options.description: By default all external file references (e.g. library files) are stored as absolute paths without any symbolic-links so the DB directory is portable anywhere on the same network. This option means external file references are stored exactly as the user entered it (e.g. full paths like /x/y, or relative paths like ../x/y, ./x/y), and any symlinks used inside the path names are also kept

options.name: -verilog
options.description: Save ASCII Verilog file also

options.name: -view
options.description: Save the OA data to this OA viewname
